prompt: Merged ending under pressure: choose fold.
why_v1: Fold protects chips when range strength does not justify continuing.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Folding fits because a merged river without a clean edge should preserve chips instead of paying off.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Fold is better when the river stays merged and your range no longer has the clean strength to keep paying or forcing action. A merged ending without a real edge should release chips instead of stretching a thin continue.
